Record Class OScriptLibraryIndex.LibraryEntry

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
com.github._1c_syntax.bsl.languageserver.types.oscript.OScriptLibraryIndex.LibraryEntry
Record Components:
uri - URI .os-файла (абсолютный, нормализованный)
qualifiedName - объявленное в lib.config имя (или basename файла для convention-based)
kind - класс или модуль
libOrigin - имя библиотеки (имя каталога с lib.config), используется gating'ом #Использовать
implicit - true, если запись добавлена неявно (необъявленный .os внутри каталога-библиотеки): полноценно индексируется во всех системах типов и ссылок, но скрывается из no-dot completion при выключенном oscript.showImplicitLibraryEntriesInCompletion.
Enclosing class:
OScriptLibraryIndex
public static record OScriptLibraryIndex.LibraryEntry(URI uri, String qualifiedName, OScriptLibraryIndex.EntryKind kind, String libOrigin, boolean implicit) extends Record
Описание зарегистрированной библиотечной записи.

  • Constructor Details

    • LibraryEntry

      public LibraryEntry(URI uri, String qualifiedName, OScriptLibraryIndex.EntryKind kind, String libOrigin, boolean implicit)
      Creates an instance of a LibraryEntry record class.
      Parameters:
      uri - the value for the uri record component
      qualifiedName - the value for the qualifiedName record component
      kind - the value for the kind record component
      libOrigin - the value for the libOrigin record component
      implicit - the value for the implicit record component

  • Method Details

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. Reference components are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object); primitive components are compared with the compare method from their corresponding wrapper classes.
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.

      Returns the value of the uri record component.

    • implicit
